name: Hot Green Beans and Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces green beans, cut into French lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients together.
2. Toss the green beans and artichoke hearts in the marinade until well coated.
3. Keep the marinated vegetables covered and refrigerate until ready to cook.
4. Before cooking, drain as much of the marinade from the vegetables as possible.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Add the beans and artichoke hearts to the skillet and cook, tossing occasionally, until heated through (about 3 or 4 minutes).
7. Add the chopped parsley and chives.
8. At the last minute, add the chopped pimento for color.
9. Serve immediately with poached haddock.
